summary: Iteration 47 - Bilingual System Cleanup + Creator-Only Statistics testing complete. All features verified: (1) Language switcher works on login/register pages, (2) User menu language toggle switches all labels immediately, (3) Profile page has IT/EN selector buttons, (4) Language persists in localStorage after navigation, (5) Admin user does NOT see Statistics link in sidebar, (6) Admin user accessing /admin/stats gets redirected to dashboard, (7) Backend GET /api/admin/stats returns 403 for admin@aic.it (non-creator).

details: Language switcher visible on login page
Clicking IT switches 'Log in' back to 'Accedi'
Language switcher visible on register page
Title switches from 'Crea il tuo account' to 'Create your account'
Step labels switch (Dati personali -> Personal info)
Dashboard nav shows 'Dashboard' in both languages
Hint text also switches (e.g., 'Le tue pratiche attive' -> 'Your active practices')
Language toggle visible in user menu (data-testid='lang-toggle-menu')
Language indicator shows current language (IT or EN)
Clicking toggle switches all visible labels immediately
Menu item shows 'Lingua' in IT and 'Language' in EN
Clicking buttons switches page labels immediately
Profile title switches: 'Profilo e impostazioni' <-> 'Profile and settings'
Language persists after navigating to Practices page
Language persists after navigating to Services page
Language persists after navigating back to Dashboard
Admin user (admin@aic.it) does NOT see Statistics link in sidebar
nav-admin-stats element not visible for admin
nav-creator-stats section not visible for admin
Admin user navigating to /admin/stats gets redirected to /dashboard
AdminStatsPage checks isCreator and redirects non-creator users
All window parameters (today, 7d, 30d, all) also return 403

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 verified the bilingual system cleanup and creator-only statistics access: (1) Language switcher on login/register pages uses data-testid='language-switcher' with 'lang-switch-it' and 'lang-switch-en' buttons. (2) User menu language toggle uses data-testid='lang-toggle-menu' with 'lang-indicator' showing IT/EN. (3) Profile page language selector uses data-testid='lang-select-it' and 'lang-select-en'. (4) Language stored in localStorage as 'herion_lang'. (5) Statistics restricted to creator role - admin user cannot see nav-admin-stats, gets redirected from /admin/stats to /dashboard, and backend returns 403. (6) All sidebar labels, quick actions, and dashboard headers switch correctly between IT and EN.
